description: Metadata contains fields common to every resource.

kind.description:
The name of the kind this resource instantiates. Must match a kind
 present in one of the loaded registries.

overlays.description: Conditional overlays applied based on CEL expressions.

items.description: Overlay is a conditional data merge applied before transforms.

file.description:
Path to the overlay file. Resolved relative to the resource file
 that declares this overlay, or used as-is when absolute.

match.description: CEL expression evaluated against the render context.

items.title: Overlay

overrides.description: Source files that have been ejected for local override.

items.description: Override maps a kind source file to a local replacement.

path.description: Local path to the override file.

source.description: Path of the source file in the kind being replaced.

items.title: Override

title: Metadata
